name: x402-spendguard
description: A spend firewall for AI agents making x402 payments. Enforces caps, allowlists, signature-integrity binding, and a kill switch before any payment is signed. Pre-alpha; v1 is anti-drain + signature integrity, EVM-only.
//files: ALLOWLIST what a published tarball ships (allowlist > denylist — same lesson as the signer route-closure). Keeps network-capable test code (test/e2e imports node:http + fetch) OUT of the package, so the 'no egress' story holds for the ARTIFACT, not just src/. The full publish surface (dist/types/exports) is designed at the npm-publish gate; until then err toward shipping less.
